name: Osh Region (Kyrgyzstan)

colors.symbolism: the rivers and sky of the Fergana Valley
courage and the historical heritage of the region

description: A white field with a red triangle issuing from the lower hoist and a blue swallow-shaped charge above.
history: Osh Region is the southernmost region of Kyrgyzstan, in the Fergana Valley. The regional flag was adopted as part of the symbols of the regional administration; it is distinct from the flag of the city of Osh, which is administered as a city of republican significance separate from the surrounding region.

features.symbolism: stylised mountain and water motifs of the Fergana Valley
